input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.9.5.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.9.5.3
            TITLE: the vehicle must not make other sounds similar to the ready to drive sound.

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.9.5.3: The vehicle must not make other sounds similar to the Ready to Drive Sound.
EV.9.5.3 The vehicle must not make other sounds similar to the Ready to Drive Sound.

final_answer: The vehicle must not make other sounds similar to the Ready to Drive Sound.
